---
title: "Bilingual Assholes: Expl Analysis"
author: "morgan moyer"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(multcomp) 
library(stringr)
library(textstem)
library(tidyverse)
library(broom.mixed)  # for tidy()
library(ggeffects)
library(lattice)

theme_set(theme_bw())
cbPalette <- c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00", "#009E73","#999999", "#E69F00")
this.dir <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(this.dir)
source("../helpers.R")

d <- read.csv("../data/processed_expl.csv")

names(d)
str(d$Language)
d$Language.n <- as.numeric(d$Language)
summary(d$Langauge.)
```

# Main model

```{r}
d <- d %>%
  mutate(
    Language.n = ifelse(Language == "English", 0, 1)
  )

d <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  mutate(Name = as.factor(Name),
         Participant = as.factor(Participant),
         ContextCondition = as.factor(ContextCondition),
         SliderResponse = as.numeric(SliderResponse),
         cLanguage = Language.n-mean(Language.n))


m <- lmer(SliderResponse ~ ContextCondition*cLanguage + (1+ContextCondition+cLanguage|Name) + (1+ContextCondition|Participant), data = d)
summary(m)
```


```{r}

levels(d$LexicalType)
d <- d %>%
  mutate(
    LexicalType.n = ifelse(LexicalType == "adj", 0, 1)
  )

dcen <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  mutate(Name = as.factor(Name),
         Participant = as.factor(Participant),
         LexicalType = as.factor(LexicalType),
         ContextCondition = as.factor(ContextCondition),
         SliderResponse = as.numeric(SliderResponse),
         cLanguage = Language.n-mean(Language.n),
         cLexicalType = LexicalType.n-mean(LexicalType.n))


m2 <- lmer(SliderResponse ~ cLexicalType*ContextCondition*cLanguage + (1+ContextCondition+cLanguage|Name) + (1+ContextCondition+cLexicalType|Participant), data = dcen)

summary(m2)

```




# Valence?


```{r}
d <- d %>%
  mutate(
    LexicalType.n = ifelse(LexicalType == "adj", 0, 1),
    Valence.n = ifelse(Valence == "neg", 0, 1)
  )

dcen <- d %>% 
  filter(Valence %in% c("pos","neg")) %>% 
  mutate(Name = as.factor(Name),
         Participant = as.factor(Participant),
         ContextCondition = as.factor(ContextCondition),
         Response = as.numeric(SliderResponse),
         cValence = Valence.n-mean(Valence.n),
         cLexicalType = LexicalType.n-mean(LexicalType.n))

m.s <- lmer(Response ~ cLexicalType*ContextCondition + (1|Name) + (1+cLexicalType+ContextCondition|Participant), data = dcen)
summary(m.s)

m.c <- lmer(Response ~ cValence*cLexicalType*ContextCondition + (1|Name) + (1+cValence+cLexicalType+ContextCondition|Participant), data = dcen)
summary(m.c)

anova(m.s,m.c)


```

#Negative only

```{r}

levels(d$LexicalType)
d <- d %>%
  mutate(
    LexicalType.n = ifelse(LexicalType == "adj", 0, 1)
  )

dcen <- d %>% 
  filter((TrialType == "test") & (Valence == "neg")) %>% 
  mutate(Name = as.factor(Name),
         Participant = as.factor(Participant),
         LexicalType = as.factor(LexicalType),
         ContextCondition = as.factor(ContextCondition),
         SliderResponse = as.numeric(SliderResponse),
         cLanguage = Language.n-mean(Language.n),
         cLexicalType = LexicalType.n-mean(LexicalType.n))


m4 <- lmer(SliderResponse ~ cLexicalType*ContextCondition + (1+ContextCondition|Name) + (1+ContextCondition+cLexicalType|Participant), data = dcen)

summary(m4)

```

# Positive

```{r}

levels(d$LexicalType)
d <- d %>%
  mutate(
    LexicalType.n = ifelse(LexicalType == "adj", 0, 1)
  )

dcen <- d %>% 
  filter((TrialType == "test") & (Valence == "pos")) %>% 
  mutate(Name = as.factor(Name),
         Participant = as.factor(Participant),
         LexicalType = as.factor(LexicalType),
         ContextCondition = as.factor(ContextCondition),
         SliderResponse = as.numeric(SliderResponse),
         cLanguage = Language.n-mean(Language.n),
         cLexicalType = LexicalType.n-mean(LexicalType.n))


m5 <- lmer(SliderResponse ~ cLexicalType*ContextCondition + (1+ContextCondition|Name) + (1+ContextCondition+cLexicalType|Participant), data = dcen)

summary(m5)

```
